summary: Completed testing of Dashboard timezone fix for 'Hoy (Tiempo Real)' vs 'Jornada Operativa' Anulaciones panel. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed dashboard loads correctly with KPI cards, Anulaciones section, and hourly sales chart showing data in local DR timezone (UTC-4).
seed_data_creation: Used existing data - bill paid at 2026-02-28T01:32:08 UTC, voids from 2026-02-27 to 2026-02-28
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard timezone fix verified. Key changes: (1) get_local_today_utc_range() at lines 28-35 calculates UTC boundaries for DR local day (UTC-4), (2) today_bills uses range filter today_start <= paid_at < today_end instead of UTC date prefix, (3) today_voids uses same range filter at line 209, (4) hourly_sales converts UTC hour to local with (utc_hour - 4) % 24 at lines 141-143. Current time verification: UTC 02:51 = DR local 22:51 (Feb 27th). The hourly chart correctly shows sales spike at 21:00 local for bill paid at 01:32 UTC.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Dashboard 'Anulaciones' panel showed conflicting data between 'Hoy (Tiempo Real)' and 'Jornada Operativa' because 'Hoy' filter used UTC dates instead of local timezone (UTC-4)
root_causes_fixed: 1) Added get_local_today_utc_range() function at lines 28-35 to calculate UTC boundaries for DR local day
2) Changed today_bills filter from UTC date prefix to range filter: today_start <= paid_at < today_end
3) Changed today_voids filter to use same range filter at line 209
4) Changed hourly_sales to convert UTC hours to local (UTC-4) with (utc_hour - 4) % 24 at lines 141-143
5) Fixed jornada_start fallback from undefined 'today' to 'today_start' at line 200
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: PASS - Dashboard now correctly displays data for local DR timezone

test_voids.both_appear_in_today: Yes - within local day range (04:00 UTC to 04:00 UTC next day)
